title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 348.436 - Expiration date
text:
348.436.  Expiration date. — The provisions of sections 348.430 to 348.436 shall expire December 31, 2028.
(L. 1999 H.B. 888 § 4, A.L. 2008 H.B. 2058, A.L. 2016 S.B. 665, A.L. 2022 1st Ex. Sess. H.B. 3) 
Effective 1-02-23
Expires 12-31-28
